creator: michael.scheidell@secnap.com
text:
logs, this works for old io-socket and new one (upward compatible)

Test with patch and io-socket-1.59:

Received: from localhost (mx1.secnap.com.ionspam.net [204.89.241.253])	(using
  TLSv1 with cipher DHE-RSA-AES256-SHA (256/256 bits))	(No client certificate
  requested)	by mx1.secnap.com.ionspam.net (Postfix) with ESMTPS id ED820621C21
	for<michael.scheidell@secnap.com>; Tue, 12 Jun 2012 08:42:19 -0400 (EDT)
Content-Disposition: inline


with io-socket-1.74:
pkg_delete p5-IO-Socket-SSL-1.59
pkg_add p5-IO-Socket-SSL-1.74.tbz

no ssl_version error: and:

Received: from localhost (mx1.secnap.com.ionspam.net [204.89.241.253])	(using
  TLSv1 with cipher ADH-CAMELLIA256-SHA (256/256 bits))	(No client certificate
  requested)	by mx1.secnap.com.ionspam.net (Postfix) with ESMTPS id E2006621C0F
	for<michael.scheidell@secnap.com>; Tue, 12 Jun 2012 08:45:30 -0400 (EDT)
